entries.text: Lead with the subject, then setting, then style and lighting; concrete nouns and specific adjectives outperform vague mood words.
Common artifact-prevention negatives: blurry, low quality, deformed, extra fingers, watermark, jpeg artifacts.
Higher guidance (CFG) follows the prompt more literally but can over-saturate; mid-range CFG 6-8 balances fidelity and naturalness for most models.
